results.title: 'If they behave, they get benefits': Vance reveals three pillars of Trump-Iran agreement
results.description: Vance said the agreement is built around three commitments: Iran will not be allowed to develop a nuclear weapon, the Strait of Hormuz will remain open to global shipping, and Tehran could receive significant economic benefits if it complies with the agreement.

results.title: Tina Ahuja Admits Rumours About Parents Govinda And Sunita Ahuja Leave Her ‘Disturbed’ At Times
results.description: Govinda and his wife, Sunita Ahuja, have been the subject of recurring speculation surrounding their marriage. From reports of an alleged separation to rumours about the actor’s personal life, the...

results.title: Novo Nordisk Data Breach: Cyber Extortion Group FulcrumSec Claims Theft of 1.3 TB of Sensitive Data After USD 25 Million Ransom Demand
results.description: The cyber extortion group FulcrumSec has claimed responsibility for hacking Novo Nordisk, alleging it stole 1.3 terabytes of data after a failed USD 25 million ransom demand. Novo Nordisk disclosed the breach on June 11, confirming unauthorised access to clinical trial data. The company is coordinating with authorities while maintaining that its core operations remain stable.

results.title: Priyanka Chopra calls mom Madhu Chopra her ‘Queen’, says she’s ‘aways leading the way’
results.description: Actor Priyanka Chopra Jonas celebrated her mother Madhu Chopra's 73rd birthday with a heartfelt social media tribute. Brother Siddharth Chopra also shared wishes, highlighting her grace and resilience. Priyanka reflected on her parents' enduring influence and support throughout her life and career
